query:
INSERT INTO oauth_app_signing_keys (
                id, oauth_app_id, kid, algorithm, public_key_pem, private_key_pem,
                status, activated_at, created_at
            ) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'active', NOW(), NOW())
            ON CONFLICT (oauth_app_id) WHERE status = 'active' DO NOTHING
